title: Internship Application Discussion
transcript: Student: Hi Ms. Reynolds. I saw the posting for the summer internship at the career center. Do you have any advice for the application? Advisor: Of course. The first step is to tailor your resume to highlight relevant coursework. Have you taken any marketing classes? Student: Yes, I took Introduction to Marketing last fall and got an A. Advisor: Excellent. Be sure to emphasize any group projects where you analyzed market trends. Also, the cover letter should explain why you are interested in that specific company. Student: I see. Should I mention my volunteer work with the student-run business club? Advisor: Absolutely. That shows leadership and initiative, which employers value highly. Student: Thank you. When is the application deadline? Advisor: March 20th. You still have three weeks, so take your time to prepare a strong application.

questions.stem: What is the student's main purpose for visiting the advisor?
options: To get feedback on a submitted application
To ask for advice on an internship application
To change her major to marketing
To request a letter of recommendation
questions.explanation: The student asks for advice on the summer internship application and how to improve it.

questions.stem: What does the advisor suggest the student emphasize in the cover letter?
options: Her grade in Introduction to Marketing
The reason she is interested in that specific company
Her availability during the summer break
The number of internships she has applied to
questions.explanation: The advisor says the cover letter should explain why she is interested in that specific company.

audioSegments.text: Hi Ms. Reynolds. I saw the posting for the summer internship at the career center. Do you have any advice for the application?
Of course. The first step is to tailor your resume to highlight relevant coursework. Have you taken any marketing classes?
Yes, I took Introduction to Marketing last fall and got an A.
Excellent. Be sure to emphasize any group projects where you analyzed market trends. Also, the cover letter should explain why you are interested in that specific company.
I see. Should I mention my volunteer work with the student-run business club?
Absolutely. That shows leadership and initiative, which employers value highly.
Thank you. When is the application deadline?
March 20th. You still have three weeks, so take your time to prepare a strong application.
